title: MoodboardDesign
description: Synthesis output across all images in a moodboard. Mirrors docs/vision/architecture.md §4.2. The core discipline: clusters[] is a first-class object; consensus claims MUST carry supportSourceIds — every claim is traceable to specific images. If <2 images support a claim it belongs in cluster.dnaSummary, not in consensus.

styleThesis.description: Short label for the overall thesis. Specific, not vibey. ≤80 chars. e.g. 'Botanical Dimensional UI', 'Editorial Plant Commerce + Diorama'. NOT 'Modern soft green design'.

clusters.description: Sub-theses inside the moodboard. Each cluster has its own DNA, weight, and source set. Cluster names must be specific labels, not vibe descriptors.

name.description: e.g. 'Pastel Clay Botanical Dashboard', 'Editorial Plant Commerce'.

dnaSummary.description: What's unique to this cluster vs the others — the cross-cluster differentiator.

localClaims.description: Claims that hold WITHIN this cluster but NOT across all clusters. These would have been consensus if they had ≥2-cluster support, but didn't, so they live here.

consensus.description: Claims that hold ACROSS clusters. Every claim carries supportSourceIds — without it, the claim is ungrounded and rejected.

tokens.description: Token candidates with source attribution. M2 produces drafts; M3 emitters refine. May be empty for moodboards with too little signal.

recipes.description: CSS recipe candidates (cluster-scoped or consensus). Draft only — M3 finalizes.

evidence.description: Why this claim holds — what cross-image pattern justifies it.

supportSourceIds.description: Source IDs from observations that support this claim. MANDATORY — no claim without grounding.

supportClusterNames.description: Optional: which clusters this claim spans.
